title: SynaptProducer
description: Structured identity for the model that produced a SynaptExtraction. Captures model, deployment, configuration, operator, and optional cryptographic attestation.

model.description: Model that produced the extraction (URI format: "provider://model-name"). E.g. "anthropic://claude-sonnet-4-6".

model_version.description: Specific model checkpoint or version string. E.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6-20250514".

deployment.description: Deployment context: region, platform, or routing tier. E.g. "us-east-1", "bedrock", "vertex".

configuration.description: Model configuration at extraction time. Known fields are standardized; provider-specific parameters are allowed.

system_prompt_hash.description: Hex digest of the system prompt used for extraction.

operator.description: Legally accountable entity that deployed the model. E.g. "synapt-dev", "acme-corp".

signature.description: Cryptographic attestation. JWS compact serialization recommended. Verifier resolves the signing key from the operator field.
